archetype: Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) mixed with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast Brutalism)

brand.name: Stride
brand.description: A brutalist dark mode fitness tracking dashboard that empowers users with high-contrast, no-nonsense data visualization, AI coaching, and deep health tracking.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none font-heading
scale.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl uppercase tracking-tight leading-tight font-heading
scale.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-mono text-neutral-500

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind default (p-4, p-6, p-8) but applied densely. Internal padding inside cards is typically p-6.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Mode B (Control Room Grid): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-col bento. gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Brutalist aesthetics: use 1px or 2px solid borders (border-border or border-white/20). Sharp edges (rounded-none).
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Hard shadows: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] or solid color shadows for primary accents.

cards.style: Flat background (bg-[#0F0F0F]), sharp corners (rounded-none), 1px solid border (border-[#262626]).
cards.hover: Hover state can involve a slight offset translation (-translate-y-1 -translate-x-1) and a hard shadow (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_var(--theme-primary)]).

buttons.primary: bg-[var(--theme-primary)] text-black font-mono uppercase tracking-wider font-bold px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:opacity-90 active:scale-95 transition-all border-2 border-transparent
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border-2 border-[#262626] font-mono uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:border-white transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-neutral-400 hover:text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-wider transition-all

badges.style: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#404040] text-white px-3 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none

ai_coach_chat.user_bubble: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#262626] p-4 rounded-none ml-8 text-neutral-200
ai_coach_chat.ai_bubble: bg-[var(--theme-primary)] text-black p-4 rounded-none mr-8 font-medium
ai_coach_chat.container: border-2 border-[#262626] bg-[#050505] h-[500px] flex flex-col

specific_features.color_scheme_chooser: A brutalist row of square color swatches. Clicking one updates the `--theme-primary` CSS variable globally. Add active state (border-2 border-white p-1) to the selected color.
specific_features.user_recipes: List format with massive typography for calorie/macro count. AI coach section embedded directly into the recipe detail view with a distinctive 'AI Analysis' block (border-l-4 border-[var(--theme-primary)]).
specific_features.sleep_water_trackers: Water: visual bar or block grid filling up. Sleep: monospaced timeline or minimalist bar chart. Both should fit in tight dashboard widgets.
specific_features.badges_system: Use Lucide React icons (e.g., Zap, Flame, Trophy, Star) sized large (w-12 h-12) wrapped in sharp square containers. When unlocked, border turns to var(--theme-primary).
specific_features.quick_action_widgets: Massive icons or bold text blocks (e.g. '+ LOG WORKOUT') inside square grid items. Brutalist hit areas.

portraits.description: Dramatic B&W portrait of muscular man

water.description: Glass of water on reflective surface

icons.usage: Use bold stroke widths (strokeWidth={2.5}) for a harsher, brutalist feel. Do not use rounded icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup CSS Variables: Add `--theme-primary: #CCFF00;` to the :root or .dark scope in index.css. All primary accents must reference this.
2. Strict Brutalism: No rounded corners on any cards or buttons (use `rounded-none`). Rely on border weights (border, border-2) and hard dropshadows.
3. Dashboard Grid: Build a tight grid layout utilizing all available screen space. Include separate widgets for Workout Log, Meal Log, Sleep Tracker, Water Intake, Insights, and Badges.
4. Color Picker: Add a small floating or header-based widget that sets the `--theme-primary` variable dynamically in React (document.documentElement.style.setProperty).
5. Testing: Add `data-testid` to all interactive components.
6. AI Coach: Ensure the AI chat has clear brutalist contrast (e.g., User messages are bordered black/grey, AI messages have solid primary backgrounds).
7. Typography: Include the Google Fonts import in index.css and extend the Tailwind theme to use `font-heading`, `font-body`, and `font-mono` as defined.
